title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at ITC Hotels

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at ITC Hotels
jsonLd.description:
ITC Hotels is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ITC Hotels:
ITC Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
